title: Tapasya, a young and dynamic District Panchayat CEO from the 2018 IAS batch, was recently appointed to a new district. Eager to understand the ground realities and improve governance, she decided to visit various public institutions under her jurisdiction.
description: Q7. Tapasya, a young and dynamic District Panchayat CEO from the 2018 IAS batch, was recently appointed to a new district. Eager to understand the ground realities and improve governance, she decided to visit various public institutions under her jurisdiction.
